dialogos.texto_en: Ohh...\nIs this the main building?
Yes, it seems to have galleries and shops inside.
It's quite unique.
I agree.\nWe've been visiting tourist spots in Okinawa,\nbut this place has a different atmosphere.
It's very colorful overall. But why is it all tiled?
Look closely.\nThe tiles on that building seem a little different.
Different?
(Now that you mention it, when you approach \n the pillar and look closely%p-2;――%p;)
Could this be glass?
...I'm really surprised.\nEach individual tile is made of glass.
That's amaaazing.\nThe name, 'Glass Village,' is not just for show.
Is that the workshop next to it?\nI can hear some work being done.
I think they offer glassblowing trial lessons there.
It seems so...\nBut, just listening to the sounds\ndoesn't give us a good idea of what they're doing.
Oh? There are various other courses available.\nLet's take a look at the brochure.
That's true.\nIt seems they offer\naccessory-making experiences as well.
But, this is definitely a glassblowing workshop!
Well, you seem very enthusiastic.\nShall we go to the workshop right away?
Oh, but how about taking a break first?\nIt looks like there's a restaurant inside this building.
Let's have some sweets\nand gather our energy for the learning experience!
(Glassblowing, huh?\n That does seem most likely and since Itsuki \n wants to experience it...)
Wow...!
(Hm? What's up?)
Look, Uesugi-kun!\nThere's stained glass on the ceiling!
WOAH!! This is amazing, too!
How beautiful...\nWhen the stained glass reflects the light,\nit can shine like this.
Ah.\nThis must be that Ryukyu glass too, right?
I wonder how much time, technique, and passion\nwas poured into all of this...
Thinking about these things,\nI also need to tighten my own resolve.\nIt was worth it to come just for this.
Hey, hey. The main event is yet to come.
...Uesugi-kun.\nThank you for inviting me here.
If you hadn't suggested it,\nI wouldn't have been able to see this beauty.
Well, I just thought of it\nbecause you were so interested in Ryukyu glass.
I'm grateful for your thoughtfulness.\nYou always try to support me like that.
I-is that so?
The sight we saw thanks to your thoughtfulness\nis a memory that only the two of us can share.
(Only the two of us...)
Y-yeah, that's right.\nThe others won't come here anyway.
Yes.\nI don't think anyone else knows about it.
It's a precious memory just for us,\nthat no one else knows about.
Yeah...
Can we look at it a little longer?
Sure, look as long as you like.
(It helps that she's looking at that. \n My face must be bright red...)
(I'm glad Itsuki was so into the stained glass.\n I can calm down now.)
(A memory just for the two of us, huh?)
(If we could continue to build these kinds of memories\n together from now on...\n No, we will.)
